# Sea

**Work-in-progress!**

**Warning:** this is a hobby project. The code is currently protoype quality and the testing largely has been limited to the author's main use cases! As I development progresses, I hope to improve the code quality and testing.

## Installation

Local installation is recommended:

```console
$ npm install --save @ridleywinters/sea
```

Then use `npx` to run the local binary:

```console
$ npx sea --help
```
